overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from an underwater exploration game (Subnautica), showing the player swimming through a narrow bioluminescent canyon with green toxic brine pools, transitioning into an open cavern with ghost weed particle effects. The scene is dark and atmospheric, illuminated primarily by the player's flashlight and glowing flora.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow underwater canyon with bioluminescent flora

agents.ego_description: swimming steadily through a narrow rocky canyon, illuminating the walls and green brine pools below with a handheld flashlight

entered.detail: dark rocky cliff face with rough texture forming the left boundary of the passage
dark rocky cliff face forming the right boundary of the underwater trench
clusters of glowing orange lantern-like flora attached to the canyon walls
small bioluminescent blue plants scattered along the canyon floor
toxic green fog or dense fluid filling the lower portion of the canyon trench

segments.scene_description: The player swims through a narrow underwater canyon flanked by dark rocky walls. Orange bioluminescent lights dot the left wall while blue glowing coral patches illuminate the right. A dense green brine pool fills the trench below as the player advances steadily forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: open underwater cavern with particle effects

events.description: white ghost weed particles suddenly materialize and swirl around the camera

agents.ego_description: descending into open water while passing through swirling white particle clouds, continuing to illuminate the green depths ahead

entered.detail: translucent white ethereal particles that swirl and float in the water column
distant dark ceiling of the cavern visible above the green water

segments.scene_description: The canyon opens up into a wide cavern as ghost weed particles suddenly appear and swirl around the player. The restrictive walls fade into the distance, replaced by open green water and a visible cavern ceiling above. The player continues descending through the particle field into the expansive underwater space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous underwater descent through a restrictive bioluminescent canyon that gradually opens into a vast, particle-filled cavern. It begins with the camera gliding through a narrow trench flanked by dark rocky walls, where orange bioluminescent lights and blue glowing coral contrast against a dense green brine pool below. As the player advances, the confining walls recede and the environment expands into a wide cavern with a visible ceiling above. The scene then shifts as swirling ghost weed particles suddenly emerge and fill the open green water, enveloping the camera. Finally, the movement continues downward, transitioning from the structured canyon into the expansive, atmospheric void of the deep cavern.
